category_sources: source_facts.description says LaTeX-to-HTML translator; official homepage says LaTeX2HTML converts LaTeX documents to web pages in HTML.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading is LaTeX2HTML; source_facts.name is latex2html.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project page and best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/latex2html/latex2html, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage identify LaTeX to HTML document conversion.
